title: Roasted Butternut Squash with Creamy Sauce
description: A delicious and comforting side dish, perfect for fall and winter meals. The roasted butternut squash is paired with a rich and creamy sauce.
instructions: Cut the butternut squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds.
Place the squash on a baking sheet, cut side up, and drizzle with butter.
Roast the squash in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
While the squash is roasting, mix the creamy sauce with brown sugar in a small bowl.
When the squash is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Spoon the creamy sauce over the roasted squash and season with salt and black pepper.
